activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception not applicable

consignor.certificate_value:
New Wave Mode AB
Åkarevägen 18
SE-455 83, DINGLE
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
New Wave Mode AB
Åkarevägen 18
455 83 Dingle
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'New Wave Mode AB' as named in the certificate is explicitly found as the issuer of the invoice with matching address and country Sweden. Allowed normalization of legal company name, address formatting and country name applied. Thus, consignor identity and country match with confidence.

consignee.invoice_value:
New Wave Group SA
Chemin des Polonais 3
2016 Cortaillod
CH
Switzerland
consignee.motivation: The consignee in the certificate is indicated as "To order" with country Switzerland. According to rule 4.2.2.2 this does not require company name match but requires that the country Switzerland is explicitly found in the invoice's delivery address or origin. Invoice's delivery address shows Switzerland as country. Thus consignee verification is MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1. 70 NE
020955-580-4 Bomber Jacket Dark Navy S
goods_description.motivation: Article number '020955-580-4' and exact product description 'Bomber Jacket Dark Navy S' given in certificate are exactly found in invoice without variation. No other semantic interpretation necessary. Article number match (priority 1) confirms goods description MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Certificate's quantity is gross weight 56 kg as per box 7 (quantity) and product description shows 70 pcs. Invoice lists quantity 70 pcs and gross weight 56 kg for matched article. Exact numeric gross weight value matches. Quantity in pcs also matches exactly. Quantity verification MATCH.

origin.certificate_value:
European Union
Item pos. 1: P.R. China
origin.motivation: Certificate origin states European Union generally and item position 1 origin as P.R. China. Invoice shows country of origin 'CN' (China), which is normalised equivalent to 'P.R. China'. European Union is allowed as general origin. The 'CN' country of origin in invoice matches certificate origin. Origin verification MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match between certificate and invoice with allowed normalization and no contradictions.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontroller av avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprung visar fullständig överensstämmelse mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten är därför godkända för automatisk behandling.
